cards.title: Acne & Psoriasis
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Acne: Naturopathic (zinc, niacinamide, omega-3, low GI diet)
  • Psoriasis: Gut-skin axis, omega-3, vitamin D3, stress management
  • Topical protocols: Aloe vera, calendula, tamanu oil
  • When to refer to dermatologist

cards.title: Hair & Fungal Conditions
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Hair loss: DHT-blocking herbs (saw palmetto, pumpkin seed oil)
  • Iron, ferritin >70, zinc, biotin for hair
  • Tinea capitis/corporis/pedis: Tea tree, neem treatment
  • Seborrhoeic dermatitis: Probiotic + zinc + selenium

cards.title: Pigmentation & Melasma
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Melasma: Sun protection (SPF 50+) + Vitamin C topical
  • Post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation management
  • Vitiligo: Naturopathic support (Polypodium, Ginkgo, Goren)
  • Skin brightening herbs: Licorice, bearberry, turmeric

cards.title: Systemic Disease Skin Signs
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Acanthosis nigricans: Insulin resistance marker
  • Xanthomas: Hyperlipidaemia
  • Dermatitis herpetiformis: Coeliac skin manifestation
  • Pyoderma gangrenosum: IBD association
